Chat Edit: 'Program return code 1. File ticket if you believe this is a false negative
Your program will be check with more testcases (private testcases) after the due date.
This check or cross does NOT mean your program have passed or failed the private testcases.
If you want to see the green tick on Ed now, create a file named .hushwarning in the root of the git repo.'

Chat Edit: 'Program return code 1. File ticket if you believe this is a false negative

This check or cross does NOT mean your program have passed or failed the private testcases.
If you want to see the green tick on Ed now, create a file named .hushwarning in the root of the git repo. UPDATE EVERYTHI NG TO ED, I can't remmeber how to add the .hushwarning?'
Chat Edit: 'Submit everything for grading one last time, please, I've tried everything!'
